summary: Mephistopheles, a powerful and ancient being, awakens in a world that has changed much since his time. He encounters Elric, a young boy who possesses extraordinary abilities, and begins to suspect that there may be others like him. Mephistopheles also interacts with the NERESTA family, who claim to support the struggling Mervinger family, but he is skeptical of their intentions. The chapter concludes with an unexpected invasion by another powerful being.
key_moments: Mephistopheles awakens in a new world
He encounters Elric and suspects that there may be others like him
The NERESTA family offers support to the Mervinger family, but Mephistopheles is skeptical
